rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"A beforeChange hook that returns undefined when data.password is absent destroys the existing stored passwordHash on any profile update.","scope":"src/collections/Users.ts:161-169"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Tests for field-level behavior must validate the correct (fixed) behavior, not the pre-existing broken behavior, otherwise they lock in the bug.","scope":"src/collections/Users.test.ts:274"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Hidden + read-guarded fields like passwordHash should use both hidden: true and access: { read: () => false } for defense in depth.","scope":"src/collections/Users.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"PBKDF2 with 25000 iterations and sha256 was chosen to align with the existing AuthService.verifyPassword pattern.","scope":"password hashing"}]}
